title: Vera Bradley Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Small Cap Consumer Research reiterated their buy rating for Vera Bradley. The current average price target is 6.98% lower than the prior average price target of $4.30. In the last three months, 5 analysts have published ratings on Vera Bradley VRA, offering a diverse range of perspectives from bullish to bearish. Average analyst rating for Vera Bradley stock is 'Buy,' indicating analysts believe this stock is likely to outperform the market over the next twelve months. 100% of analysts recommend a Strong Buy. Vera Bradley faces challenges, with a net margin of -46.99%, which may reflect analyst concerns about the company's financial performance.
